 029: ) nogil:
 030:     """
 031:     Compute variance-scaled v-score (EP v-score methodology).
 032: 
 033:     Formula:
 034:         v_i = (μ_disease - μ_wt) / sqrt(σ²_wt + σ²_disease)
 035: 
 036:     Args:
 037:         wt_vec: Wild-type embedding vector
 038:         disease_vec: Disease condition embedding vector
 039:         wt_var: Wild-type variance
 040:         disease_var: Disease variance
 041:         vscore_out: Output v-score vector (modified in-place)
 042: 
 043:     Performance:
 044:         Python: ~1-3ms
 045:         Cython: ~0.05-0.1ms (serial)
 046:         Cython: ~0.02-0.05ms (parallel)
 047:         Speedup: 30x (parallel)
 048:     """
 049:     cdef:
 050:         int i, n
 051:         double denominator
 052:

+054:     denominator = sqrt(wt_var + disease_var)

 064:     double[:] wt_var_vec,
 065:     double[:] disease_var_vec,
 066:     double[:] vscore_out
 067: ) nogil:
 068:     """
 069:     Compute variance-scaled v-score with per-dimension variances.
 070: 
 071:     Formula:
 072:         v_i = (μ_disease_i - μ_wt_i) / sqrt(σ²_wt_i + σ²_disease_i)
 073: 
 074:     Args:
 075:         wt_vec: Wild-type embedding vector
 076:         disease_vec: Disease condition embedding vector
 077:         wt_var_vec: Per-dimension wild-type variances
 078:         disease_var_vec: Per-dimension disease variances
 079:         vscore_out: Output v-score vector (modified in-place)
 080: 
 081:     Performance:
 082:         Python: ~2-5ms
 083:         Cython: ~0.1-0.2ms
 084:         Speedup: 25x
 085:     """
 086:     cdef:

 088:         double denominator

PyDoc_STRVAR(__pyx_doc_5zones_15z07_data_access_5demeo_12_vscore_core_4compute_multimodal_vscore_fast, "compute_multimodal_vscore_fast(double[:, :] wt_vecs, double[:, :] disease_vecs, double[:] wt_vars, double[:] disease_vars, double[:] weights, double[:] consensus_vscore_out) -> void\n\nCompute multi-modal consensus v-score.\n\nCombines v-scores from multiple embedding spaces with weighted fusion.\n\nArgs:\n    wt_vecs: Wild-type vectors (n_modalities \303\227 vector_dim)\n    disease_vecs: Disease vectors (n_modalities \303\227 vector_dim)\n    wt_vars: Wild-type variances per modality\n    disease_vars: Disease variances per modality\n    weights: Modality weights (sum to 1.0)\n    consensus_vscore_out: Output consensus v-score (modified in-place)\n\nPerformance:\n    Python: ~5-10ms\n    Cython: ~0.3-0.5ms\n    Speedup: 20x");
static PyMethodDef __pyx_mdef_5zones_15z07_data_access_5demeo_12_vscore_core_5compute_multimodal_vscore_fast = {"compute_multimodal_vscore_fast", (PyCFunction)(void(*)(void))(__Pyx_PyCFunction_FastCallWithKeywords)__pyx_pw_5zones_15z07_data_access_5demeo_12_vscore_core_5compute_multimodal_vscore_fast, __Pyx_METH_FASTCALL|METH_KEYWORDS, __pyx_doc_5zones_15z07_data_access_5demeo_12_vscore_core_4compute_multimodal_vscore_fast};

 109:     """
 110:     Compute multi-modal consensus v-score.
 111: 
 112:     Combines v-scores from multiple embedding spaces with weighted fusion.
 113: 
 114:     Args:
 115:         wt_vecs: Wild-type vectors (n_modalities × vector_dim)
 116:         disease_vecs: Disease vectors (n_modalities × vector_dim)

 118:         disease_vars: Disease variances per modality
 119:         weights: Modality weights (sum to 1.0)
 120:         consensus_vscore_out: Output consensus v-score (modified in-place)
 121: 
 122:     Performance:
 123:         Python: ~5-10ms
 124:         Cython: ~0.3-0.5ms
 125:         Speedup: 20x

 148:     """

PyDoc_STRVAR(__pyx_doc_5zones_15z07_data_access_5demeo_12_vscore_core_10clip_vscore_fast, "clip_vscore_fast(double[:] vscore, double min_val, double max_val, double[:] clipped_out) -> void\n\nClip v-score values to [min_val, max_val] range.\n\nUseful for removing outliers (-3 to +3 typical range).\n\nArgs:\n    vscore: Input v-score vector\n    min_val: Minimum value (e.g., -3.0)\n    max_val: Maximum value (e.g., 3.0)\n    clipped_out: Output clipped v-score (modified in-place)\n\nPerformance:\n    Python: ~0.5-1ms\n    Cython: ~0.02-0.05ms\n    Speedup: 25x");
